meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no version control (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Fix Version Control for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop losing work. Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to automate version control and ship professional, reliable code for your freelance clients.
content.answer_block: To solve the lack of version control, integrate Claude Code with your repository to automate commit messages and branch management. By pairing this with Antigravity, you gain context-aware code generation that enforces Git best practices, ensuring every feature you ship is tracked, revertible, and professional-grade for your clients.
content.intro:
The cold sweat of a overwritten file is a rite of passage every freelancer knows too well. You are mid-sprint, the deadline is looming, and you realize you have no audit trail—just a folder full of 'final_v2_fixed.js' nightmares. It is the silent killer of profitability and professional reputation.

But the era of manual, error-prone versioning ends now. By leveraging Claude Code alongside Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a sophisticated engineering partner. We are moving beyond simple coding; we are building a robust, automated pipeline that treats your version control as a first-class citizen of your dev workflow.

steps.title: Initialize Git with Best Practices
steps.description: Before Claude touches your code, you need a solid repository structure. We ensure your .gitignore is airtight to prevent clutter.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory and generate a comprehensive .gitignore for a modern SaaS project including node_modules, .env, and build artifacts.
steps.claude_code_command: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit: Project scaffold'

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context
steps.description: Connect Claude to your project root so it understands your existing architectural patterns and naming conventions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudecoderules file that enforces standard commit message formats and ensures all code changes are tracked.

steps.title: Automate Feature Branching
steps.description: Never work on the main branch again. Use Claude to generate feature branches for every discrete task.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a git workflow strategy for a solo developer that uses short-lived feature branches and clear naming conventions.

steps.title: Execute Code Changes with Auto-Commit
steps.description: Have Claude implement a feature and immediately stage the changes for review, maintaining a perfect history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the user authentication module using Supabase, ensuring all new functions are documented with JSDoc.

steps.title: Verify History and Deploy
steps.description: Perform a final audit of your commit history to ensure client-ready documentation before merging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the last 5 commits for semantic clarity and suggest improvements for the commit messages.

pro_tips: Use 'claude --read-only' mode when exploring legacy client code to prevent accidental architectural drift.
Alias your most frequent Claude Code commands in your .zshrc to save 10+ minutes of typing daily.
Always run 'git diff' after a Claude Code session to audit changes before the automatic commit.
Create a 'context.md' file in your root; Claude reads this to understand your specific coding preferences.
Use Antigravity to generate custom unit tests for every feature branch to ensure your commit history remains green.
resources: Git Best Practices for SaaS: https://git-scm.com/book
content.next_steps: Now that your version control is automated, set up a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to deploy your code automatically upon merging your feature branches.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start building the future of your freelance business with a professional, automated workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
